trend_signal: Remote work and digital nomad lifestyle continue to rise
stock_safe_concept: Minimalistic home office setup with ergonomic furniture and natural light, featuring a clean desk, adjustable chair, laptop, and potted plants
buyer_use_cases: Blog articles on remote work productivity
Social media posts about work-life balance
risk_notes: No real persons or identifiable brands; all objects generic and stylized
score_reason: Strong relevance to ongoing remote work trends, broad commercial applicability, and low risk for copyright or privacy issues.

trend_signal: Sustainability and eco-friendly living gaining momentum
stock_safe_concept: Stylized zero waste kitchen scene with reusable containers, glass jars, cloth bags, fresh vegetables, and compost bin, no people included
visual_elements: Wooden cutting board with fresh vegetables
Natural textures like wood and linen
risk_notes: Completely generic kitchen scene, no identifiable items or brands present
score_reason: High commercial appeal in sustainability niche, visually clean and safe for broad use.

trend_signal: Health and wellness focus, especially mental health and mindfulness
stock_safe_concept: Cozy indoor meditation corner with cushions, candles, incense, and soft natural light, featuring abstract art and plants but no persons
buyer_use_cases: Social media content for mental health
risk_notes: No identifiable people or copyrighted art, all elements generic and stylized
score_reason: Timely wellness theme with strong visual appeal, low risk, and wide buyer interest.

trend_signal: Technology integration in daily life, especially smart home devices
stock_safe_concept: Abstract digital interface depicting smart home control dashboard on tablet screen, with icons for lights, thermostat, security, and music, no real UI or brand elements
visual_elements: Generic smart home icons (light bulb, thermostat, lock, music note)
risk_notes: Avoids real UI screenshots or branded icons, all icons are generic and newly designed
score_reason: Strong trend relevance and demand, but slightly niche compared to broader lifestyle themes.

trend_signal: Plant-based diets and home cooking popularity
stock_safe_concept: Top-down view of colorful plant-based ingredients and dishes on rustic kitchen table, including fresh vegetables, grains, and herbs, no persons or brands visible
visual_elements: Assorted fresh vegetables (tomatoes, leafy greens, bell peppers)
risk_notes: No branded food packaging or products, purely generic ingredients and dishes
score_reason: Highly commercially useful, visually attractive, and perfectly aligned with ongoing food trends.
